articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Swiss bank BancaStato launches regulated crypto trading with Sygnum
articles.summary: Swiss cantonal bank BancaStato integrated Sygnum’s crypto trading and custody services into its Avaloq-powered digital banking apps for Bitcoin and other assets.

articles.title: Swiss Bank BancaStato Launches Bitcoin Trading Through Sygnum and Avaloq
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Swiss Bank BancaStato Launches Bitcoin Trading Through Sygnum and Avaloq
BancaStato has become the latest Swiss bank to offer regulated bitcoin trading through its existing banking apps via Sygnum's infrastructure.
This post Swiss Bank BancaStato Launches Bitcoin Trading Through Sygnum and Avaloq first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: South Korea’s Mirae Asset completes acquisition of Korbit crypto exchange
articles.summary: Mirae Asset also plans to increase its stake from 92.06% to 97.15% through an additional deal later this week, local media reported.

articles.title: Arbitrum-based AFX Trade drained of $24 million after bridge keys compromised
White House accuses Moonshot AI of distilling Anthropic tech for K3
articles.summary: US officials warn that Chinese firms conducting covert, industrial-scale AI distillation could face sanctions and export restrictions.

articles.title: XRP whales accumulate as small holders capitulate
Bitcoin wilts as oil and rates rise. Clarity Act odds tumble to 38%
SEC settles Coinbase suit over ‘text messages that disappeared’
articles.summary: The settlement follows a watchdog report last year that blamed “avoidable errors” for the loss of nearly a year’s worth of Gary Gensler’s text messages.

articles.title: Hackers steal $31.6M in 2 crypto bridge attacks within 7 hours
articles.summary: AFX, a decentralized perpetual exchange operating on Arbitrum, reportedly lost $24.15 million on Wednesday, while the Verus Ethereum bridge was attacked hours later.

articles.title: Arbitrum protocol AFX Trade hit by $24 million bridge exploit: Blockaid
articles.summary: PeckShield flagged that the attacker bridged the stolen funds from Arbitrum to Ethereum and swapped them for 12,467 ETH.

articles.title: Senator Lummis: Ethics, other provisions in crypto Clarity Act to be further discussed
Key Democratic lawmakers say crypto Clarity Act 'falls short' on ethics, other issues
Bipartisan support ‘critical’ as Democrats push back on GOP crypto bill on ethics grounds
articles.summary: Latest Clarity Act draft is drawing praise from the crypto industry and criticism from Democrats and bankers, highlighting deep divisions.

articles.title: Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology to Take 3,500 Bitcoin in Proposed PIPE Financing
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology to Take 3,500 Bitcoin in Proposed PIPE Financing
Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology plans to accept 3,500 bitcoin in a proposed $220 million PIPE deal, a move that would transform the Chinese insurance-tech firm into the latest public company building a bitcoin treasury.
This post Nasdaq-listed Zhibao Technology to Take 3,500 Bitcoin in Proposed PIPE Financing first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Coinbase Wants to Be Canada's One-Stop Shop for Stocks, Crypto and Prediction Markets
articles.summary: The company's "Everything Exchange" is heading north. No launch date set yet, but the Coinbase Canada CEO says phase two for the company is in motion.

articles.title: S&P launches blockchain fundamentals index for digital assets
articles.summary: The benchmark tracks blockchain networks using protocol revenue, offering an alternative to traditional market capitalization-weighted crypto indexes.

articles.title: Crypto’s US Workforce Is Tiny, But Industry Punches Above Its Weight: Report
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Crypto’s US Workforce Is Tiny, But Industry Punches Above Its Weight: Report
There aren't that many crypto jobs in the US but the industry contributes a lot, a new report says. 
This post Crypto’s US Workforce Is Tiny, But Industry Punches Above Its Weight: Report first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

articles.title: Tesla holds bitcoin treasury steady, reports $112M impairment loss
Crypto PAC pours $1M into Michigan Democratic primary race
articles.summary: Donavan McKinney, running against Michigan incumbent Shri Thanedar, said that “the crypto lobby is paying my opponent back for helping Trump“ with the PAC-funded ads.

articles.title: Kraken Parent Company Makes Moves to Offer xStocks From Global Markets
articles.summary: Payward and fintech GTN are teaming up to bring xStocks—blockchain-based copies of real company shares—to Hong Kong, the UK, Europe, and South Korea.

articles.title: Benchmark Raises Hut 8 Price Target After Bitcoin Miner Signs $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Benchmark Raises Hut 8 Price Target After Bitcoin Miner Signs $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
Bitcoin miner Hut 8's stock will soar due to its AI ambitions, according to investment bank Benchmark. 
This post Benchmark Raises Hut 8 Price Target After Bitcoin Miner Signs $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

articles.title: Lightning Labs Launches Wavelength: “Bitcoin on Easy Mode” for Developers and Autonomous Agents
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Lightning Labs Launches Wavelength: “Bitcoin on Easy Mode” for Developers and Autonomous Agents
Available immediately on Signet and testnet (mainnet invitation-only), Wavelength exposes the same API to AI agents through the Model Context Protocol so machines can pay machines in fractions of a cent while users retain full key control.
This post Lightning Labs Launches Wavelength: “Bitcoin on Easy Mode” for Developers and Autonomous Agents first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine an...

articles.title: Alibaba's New Qwen Image 3 AI Wants to Be Useful, Not Just Pretty
articles.summary: Qwen Image 3.0 generates dense newspapers and infographic grids in one shot and renders text down to 10 pixels. The catch: no benchmarks, no open weights.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton Says Agentic AI Is Crypto's 'Killer Use Case'
articles.summary: The asset manager argues that AI software capable of paying for things autonomously will need blockchain rails to work—and that most investors aren't positioned for it.

articles.title: Bitcoin Is Bouncing: Here’s the Bull and Bear Case for Its Next Move
articles.summary: The good news: Bitcoin is holding onto key support, and rising. The bad news: a "death cross" is still active, and prediction markets are still overwhelmingly bearish.

articles.title: US officials barred until 2029 from issuing or sponsoring tokens under CLARITY’s proposed ethics rules
articles.summary: According to Senator Cynthia Lummis, one of the bill’s advocates, the ethics language would apply to US presidents’ crypto ventures, including Donald Trump’s.

articles.title: Clarity Act’s impact on Circle could be negative over the long term, Mizuho says
articles.summary: On Wednesday, the Clarity Act took one step closer to becoming law as Republicans released the latest text for the legislation.

articles.title: Anthropic joins UK FCA’s AI regulatory sandbox as second cohort launches
articles.summary: Anthropic will provide Claude AI models to companies participating in the UK Financial Conduct Authority’s next Supercharged Sandbox cohort, as the regulator pushes to test AI applications in financial services.

articles.title: Clarity Act Latest Draft Bars Trump From Crypto Ventures—But Only Until 2029
articles.summary: The long-awaited market-structure bill would block officials and their spouses from issuing digital assets and shield non-custodial developers, but the ethics ban expires in 2029 and enforcement rests solely with the DOJ.

articles.title: Benchmark sees Hut 8 becoming a ‘power-first data center REIT,’ raises target another 18%
articles.summary: Benchmark’s new price target implies roughly 75% upside, with Hut 8 shares already up nearly 120% year to date.

articles.title: SEC’s Peirce says crypto vaults and onchain lending may fall under securities laws
articles.summary: The SEC commissioner said crypto vaults, onchain lending products and other asset management tools may trigger US securities laws, depending on how they are structured and operated.

articles.title: Kraken parent Payward partners with GTN to scale xStocks internationally, beyond US equities
articles.summary: xStocks is tokenizing equities from Hong Kong before expanding to the UK, Europe, South Korea, and other international markets.

articles.title: New Clarity Act Draft Would Bar Trump and Officials From Issuing Crypto, With a 2029 Sunset
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

New Clarity Act Draft Would Bar Trump and Officials From Issuing Crypto, With a 2029 Sunset
Senate Republicans unveiled a revised Clarity Act that adds a temporary ban on top federal officials issuing or sponsoring digital assets while preserving key pro-crypto provisions.
This post New Clarity Act Draft Would Bar Trump and Officials From Issuing Crypto, With a 2029 Sunset first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Winklevoss Twins Donated $10 Million From Bitcoin Sale to Trump Super PAC
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Winklevoss Twins Donated $10 Million From Bitcoin Sale to Trump Super PAC
Crypto entrepreneurs Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss have again donated their Bitcoin to President Trump. 
This post Winklevoss Twins Donated $10 Million From Bitcoin Sale to Trump Super PAC first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

articles.title: SEC reaches settlement with Coinbase over records requests from Gensler era
articles.summary: The SEC reached a settlement with Coinbase on Wednesday, ending a years-long legal dispute over the agency's handling of records requests.

articles.title: Senate releases latest version of Clarity Act including software developer protections and ethics provision with ‘sunset’ date in 2029
articles.summary: After months of deliberations, Republicans released the latest text for broader cryptocurrency legislation.

articles.title: Digital Chamber sues Illinois officials over new state 0.2% crypto tax
articles.summary: The group alleged that the tax signed into law in June “discriminates against people who transact in digital assets“ and should be blocked from implementation and enforcement.

articles.title: Hugging Face CEO Thanks Chinese AI for Saving the Day After OpenAI Hack
articles.summary: When American commercial AI refused to help investigate the breach, Hugging Face ran Chinese model GLM 5.2 locally. Its CEO now says there's an important lesson in this.

articles.title: New draft of Clarity Act is out, and it would impose limits on Trump's crypto empire
BitGo, OTC Markets plan tokenized securities access for broker-dealers
articles.summary: The proposed alliance would enable more than 150 broker-dealers to trade and settle digital asset securities through OTC Link ATS using BitGo’s custody infrastructure.

articles.title: Crypto directly employs 34,000 in the US and contributes $55 billion to the economy: NCA report
articles.summary: Crypto directly employs 34,000 in the U.S. and contributes $55 billion to the economy in 2026, according to an NCA-funded report.

articles.title: Bitcoin price avoids major Iran jitters as S&P 500 ‘short squeeze’ on horizon
articles.summary: Bitcoin and US stocks stayed strong in the face of US-Iran escalation as analysis predicted BTC price action outperforming equities later.

articles.title: Revolut hits $115 billion valuation in employee share sale: WSJ
Crypto ‘wrench attacks’ persist as total climbs to 52 and value targeted jumps more than tenfold, CertiK says
articles.summary: CertiK recommends limiting public information that connects a person’s identity, location or routine to their crypto holdings.

articles.title: SEC's Peirce warns some DeFi vaults, onchain lending may fall under securities laws
UK digital bond plans hinge on one missing piece: onchain cash
Bitcoin ETFs Take in Nearly $1B in New Money — But What Will the Price Do?
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin ETFs Take in Nearly $1B in New Money — But What Will the Price Do?
Bitcoin ETFs have taken in new cash from US investors after weeks of sloppy action. 
This post Bitcoin ETFs Take in Nearly $1B in New Money — But What Will the Price Do? first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

articles.title: Coinbase Settles FOIA Fight With the SEC Over Gensler’s Vanished Texts
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Coinbase Settles FOIA Fight With the SEC Over Gensler’s Vanished Texts
Coinbase settled its FOIA lawsuit against the SEC after the agency admitted it destroyed former Chair Gary Gensler's text messages, securing a $150,000 payment and reforms to the SEC's record-retention policies.
This post Coinbase Settles FOIA Fight With the SEC Over Gensler’s Vanished Texts first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: ‘You will have a painful fall’: SEC’s Peirce warns crypto vault builders against twisting securities law
articles.summary: Hester Peirce, aka "Crypto Mom", issued a statement clarifying that onchain vaults and lending may fall under the SEC's remit.
